title: EDEN wire error (RFC 7807 profile)
description: Error envelope returned on every non-2xx response by a conforming EDEN HTTP server. The `type` URI is the authoritative machine-readable error code; HTTP status alone is not sufficient to distinguish conflict classes. See 07-wire-protocol.md §7.

type.description: Closed v0 vocabulary of error types.

title.description: Short human phrase (stable across minor versions).

status.description: HTTP status code; denormalized into the body for parser convenience.

instance.description: The request URL (or an opaque instance identifier).
